raw_question: 凯莱英2025年第三季度营业总收入环比增长率（与2025年Q2比较）
raw_question_json: [{"Q":"凯莱英2025年第三季度营业总收入环比增长率（与2025年Q2比较）"}]

query_plan.question: 凯莱英2025年第三季度营业总收入环比增长率（与2025年Q2比较）

sql: WITH base AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, report_period, total_operating_revenue FROM financials_view WHERE stock_abbr = '凯莱英' AND report_period IN ('2025Q2', '2025H1', '2025Q3')), agg AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025Q2' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS total_operating_revenue_q2, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025H1' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS total_operating_revenue_h1, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS total_operating_revenue_q3_cumulative FROM base GROUP BY stock_code, stock_abbr) SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, '2025Q2' AS report_period_prev, total_operating_revenue_q2 AS total_operating_revenue_prev, '2025Q3' AS report_period_curr, (total_operating_revenue_q3_cumulative - total_operating_revenue_h1) AS total_operating_revenue_curr, ROUND((((total_operating_revenue_q3_cumulative - total_operating_revenue_h1) - total_operating_revenue_q2) / ABS(total_operating_revenue_q2)) * 100, 2) AS qoq_growth FROM agg WHERE total_operating_revenue_q2 IS NOT NULL AND total_operating_revenue_q2 != 0 AND total_operating_revenue_h1 IS NOT NULL AND total_operating_revenue_q3_cumulative IS NOT NULL
sql_history: WITH base AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, report_period, total_operating_revenue FROM financials_view WHERE stock_abbr = '凯莱英' AND report_period IN ('2025Q2', '2025H1', '2025Q3')), agg AS ( SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025Q2' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS total_operating_revenue_q2, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025H1' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS total_operating_revenue_h1, MAX(CASE WHEN report_period = '2025Q3' THEN total_operating_revenue END) AS total_operating_revenue_q3_cumulative FROM base GROUP BY stock_code, stock_abbr) SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, '2025Q2' AS report_period_prev, total_operating_revenue_q2 AS total_operating_revenue_prev, '2025Q3' AS report_period_curr, (total_operating_revenue_q3_cumulative - total_operating_revenue_h1) AS total_operating_revenue_curr, ROUND((((total_operating_revenue_q3_cumulative - total_operating_revenue_h1) - total_operating_revenue_q2) / ABS(total_operating_revenue_q2)) * 100, 2) AS qoq_growth FROM agg WHERE total_operating_revenue_q2 IS NOT NULL AND total_operating_revenue_q2 != 0 AND total_operating_revenue_h1 IS NOT NULL AND total_operating_revenue_q3_cumulative IS NOT NULL

turn_answers.Q: 凯莱英2025年第三季度营业总收入环比增长率（与2025年Q2比较）

A.content: 凯莱英（股票代码：002821）2025年第三季度营业总收入为144,157.06万元，与2025年第二季度的164,709.10万元相比，环比增长率为-12.48%。
